series_metadata.series_title: NATURAL RESOURCES COMMISSION MINUTES JOURNAL RECREATION
series_metadata.series_description: (a) Natural Resources Commission was renamed in 1963 to the Recreation and Resources Commission. The Journal Books are the complete record of proceedings of each and every Commission meeting from the date of the creation of the Department of Natural Resources in 1949 to the present time. Need for ready reference. (b) the Director''''s Journal is a complete record of all items which by law must be ''''journalized'''' in the Director''''s Journal. Also referred to frequently

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain originals in department permanently. Send copy to State Archives after each meeting., Paper: Archives
